title: Addition
summary: Addition describes the combination of quantities into a total.
claim: Addition combines quantities into a larger quantity while preserving consistent quantity relationships.
proof: If one collection has quantity a and another has quantity b, combining the two collections and recounting gives a total a + b.
validation: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic.
reconstruction: Can be rediscovered by placing two groups of objects together and counting the combined set.
